FBW.A320-Profile.json.Author: Fragtality
FBW.A320-Profile.json.Name: FlyByWire A320
FBW.A320-Profile.json.Description:
Profile for Automation and Volume-Control on the FBW A320.
Import the Flightplan in the MCDU to trigger Departure Services.
Don't forget to power on the EFB first!
The SmartButton is mapped to the MECH Call Button on the Overhead.

FBW.A380-Profile.json.Author: Fragtality
FBW.A380-Profile.json.Name: FlyByWire A380
FBW.A380-Profile.json.Description:
Profile for Automation and Volume-Control on the FBW A380.
Import the Flightplan in the MCDU to trigger Departure Services.
Don't forget to power on the EFB first!
The SmartButton is mapped to the INT/RAD Switch on the ACP (Captain).

FNX.Native.json.Author: Fragtality
FNX.Native.json.Name: Fenix - Native
FNX.Native.json.Description: Profile enhancing Fenix' native GSX Integration with Automation and Volume Control

IFLY.737-Profile.json.Author: FatGingerHead
IFLY.737-Profile.json.Name: iFLY 737
IFLY.737-Profile.json.Description:
Profile for Automation and Volume-Control for the iFLY B737.
IMPORTANT: Set a lower than planned Fuel Amount before starting the Departure Services, else the Fuel Service isn't called with iFly's default of 50% FOB.
NOTE: You need to set Fuel and Payload manually and separately! (Fuel when the Hose is connected, Payload when Boarding is running).
The SmartButton is mapped to the INT/RAD Switch on the Captain's ACP.

PMDG.737-Profile.json.Name: PMDG 737
PMDG.737-Profile.json.Author: FatGingerHead
PMDG.737-Profile.json.Description:
Profile for Automation and Volume-Control for the PMDG B737.
IMPORTANT: Usage of GSX' internal Aircraft Profile is adviced.
NOTE: Use 'GRD CALL' Button to trigger Departure Services (after the Aircraft is powered and NAV Lights on)!
The SmartButton is now mapped to the R/T I/C switch on the Radio Panel!
